//: Layer-0 OS containment for reviewing untrusted code. Works for BOTH Claude Code and GitHub Copilot (both can run inside a dev container). This is the only layer that survives a full injection compromise. Open the UNTRUSTED repo in this container (VS Code: 'Reopen in Container'), or `devcontainer up`. See devcontainer/README.md.
name: untrusted-code-triage-sandbox
//runArgs: Non-root, no new privileges, dropped capabilities, tmpfs workspace. Uncomment the network line ONLY when you will not run the AI tool inside the container (it needs egress to the LLM API); if the tool runs on the host and only the code lives here, --network=none is ideal.
//mounts: Repo is bind-mounted READ-ONLY. No host credential dirs (~/.ssh, ~/.aws, ~/.npmrc) are mounted. Do NOT add host credential mounts.
postCreateCommand: echo 'Sandbox ready. Repo is READ-ONLY at /workspace. Review only — do not build/run/install.'
